title: Collision Detector
description: A simple mod that ads a collider entity that can trigger functions on player entering the collision area
body:
This mod will allow you to create collider entities that can then be used to trigger funciton commands

adds command:
/collider

adds entity
collision_detector:collision_detector
(note: using the summon command will not work and you will need to edit the entity with the collider command for it to work)
